untranslatable_reason: Cannot translate: (1) 'Last 3 closes are above previous close (rising demand confirmation)' requires multi-bar lookback comparison that cannot be expressed with single prev_close reference; (2) 'Volume drops below 20-period moving average for 2 consecutive bars' requires state tracking across 2 bars; (3) 'No news event expected within 24 hours' is external fundamental data not available in price/volume indicators
translation_notes: Translated core quantifiable conditions: volume > 20-period MA, price > 50-period SMA, and at least current close > previous close. Exit uses price close below 50-period SMA. The multi-bar consecutive conditions and news event checking require external data sources or state management beyond allowed operators. Entry reduced to 3 conditions (most critical). Demand confirmation via 3 consecutive up closes and consecutive volume drops are marked untranslatable.
